# lib_mock_cc-by-3.0-us_3

A fantastic open-source library that helps you do amazing things.

## Installation
`pip install lib_mock_cc-by-3.0-us_3`

## Usage
Import the module and start using it immediately:
```python
import lib_mock_cc-by-3.0-us_3
lib_mock_cc-by-3.0-us_3.run()
```
